com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client

Class ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • ExecutionRequestHandlerService
      • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl

  • public class ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
extends ExecutionRequestHandlerService
    Client handler used by the RemoteExecutionClient.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15
